title: senecio pinnatifidus
intro: Senecio pinnatifidus, also known as the Woolly Groundsel or Woolly Senecio, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its woolly, greyish-green leaves and yellow daisy-like flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Senecio pinnatifidus include its ability to stimulate digestion, improve liver function, and boost the immune system. Senecio pinnatifidus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with its leaves being dried and used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
